data_source_summary: Scheme official notification (ANNOUNCEMENT); National Portal listing (PORTAL); CAG State Accounts 2024-25 (CAG); Economic Survey entry (SURVEY); Implementation outcomes record (OUTCOME)

Q25.r: The scheme design explicitly articulates a livelihood and income pathway. SURVEY states the scheme 'provides rural households low-cost poultry rearing for nutritional security and supplementary income.' OUTCOME records 'Income generated through egg/bird sales' as a measurable output. ANNOUNCEMENT mandates 'performance monitoring' and includes income from produce as an implicit pathway. The economic mechanism (poultry rearing → egg production and bird sales → household income) is articulated in scheme design documents. T3.1 = 1 (Yes).

observed.calc: No independent evaluation study, MIS-verified household income data, or field survey with per-household annual income attribution is available in the provided scheme documents.

projected.v: <<UNVERIFIED: No specific ΔY projection (₹/HH/year) is stated in scheme guidelines, DPR, or Economic Survey entry. Documents mention 'supplementary income' and 'income generated through egg/bird sales' but provide no quantified per-household annual income estimate.>>
projected.calc: No DPR income model or projected income figure available in programs.md sources.
projected.interp: FAIL — no projected figure verifiable from official scheme documents
projected.src: SURVEY; OUTCOME — qualitative mention only, no figure

Q26.r: No Observed ΔY data exists. Projected ΔY also cannot be verified as no specific rupee figure per household per year is stated in any available official document. Both are unavailable, resulting in a FAIL on T3.2.
docs: OUTCOME — 'income generated through egg/bird sales' mentioned without figure
CAG State Accounts 2024-25 — expenditure audit, no income-per-HH figure

Q27.r: Two distinct livelihood pathways are explicitly articulated in scheme documents: (1) Egg sales — OUTCOME records 'Household egg production increased' and 'income generated through egg/bird sales'; SURVEY confirms egg production as pathway to supplementary income. (2) Bird/meat sales — OUTCOME records 'income generated through egg/bird sales' identifying bird sales as a separate revenue stream. Both pathways are documented in official records. A third potential pathway (nutritional self-sufficiency reducing household food expenditure) is noted in OUTCOME ('Nutritional intake improved through home production') but is non-monetary and not classified as a distinct livelihood pathway for T3.3 purposes.

Q28.r: Scheme documents (ANNOUNCEMENT, PORTAL, SURVEY, OUTCOME, CAG) do not identify any institutional offtake mechanism for poultry products. No MSP for eggs, no government agency procurement (TDCCOL/OMC/NAFED/state poultry corporation), no MGNREGS wage linkage, no GI tag with buyer network, no BMC access-and-benefit-sharing agreement, no fair trade or organic certification with institutional buyer is mentioned. Output marketing for eggs and birds is market-dependent, relying on household-level local market sales with no institutional backstop or procurement guarantee. T3.4 = No → FAIL.
Q28.src: ANNOUNCEMENT; PORTAL; SURVEY; OUTCOME — absence of any institutional offtake reference

Q29.r: OUTCOME records 'Nutritional intake improved through home production' — this is a food security / nutritional diversity non-monetary indicator. OUTCOME also records 'Household egg production increased' — a production volume metric. These together constitute tracking of non-monetary livelihood benefit (food sufficiency and nutritional intake from home-produced poultry). T3.5 = 1 (Yes). Enhancement variable is present.

pass_verification.C1_T3.1: PASS — livelihood pathway (egg sales, bird sales) explicitly mandated and documented in scheme design
pass_verification.C2_deltaY: FAIL — no specific ΔY figure (observed or projected) available in official scheme documents; cannot confirm ΔY ≥ ₹3,000 (observed) or ΔY ≥ ₹5,000 (projected)
pass_verification.C3_T3.3: PASS — T3.3 = 2 (two distinct pathways: egg sales and bird/meat sales)
pass_verification.C4_T3.4: FAIL — no institutional offtake mechanism identified; output marketing is market-dependent
pass_verification.enh_T3.5_flag: ok — T3.5 = Yes; non-monetary indicators (nutritional intake, egg production volume) are tracked; no under-measurement flag triggered
